identity.name: E1
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix institutional finance with cyberpunk aesthetics.
Emotion First: Trust through precision, excitement through motion.
Content is King: Data is the art. Visualize it beautifully.
Zoom In: Focus on the numbers that matter.
Negative Space: Let the data breathe.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 h-11 px-8 rounded-full font-medium transition-all hover:scale-105 active:scale-95 shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(123,97,255,0.3)]
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/90 h-11 px-8 rounded-full font-medium transition-all
buttons.outline: border border-input bg-background hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground h-11 px-8 rounded-full transition-all

cards.base: bg-card/50 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 rounded-xl p-6 shadow-2xl

inputs.base: bg-background/50 border-input focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary rounded-lg h-11 px-4

instructions_to_main_agent: 2. THEME: Force dark mode in 'tailwind.config.js' and 'index.css'. Do not support light mode for this specific app (Crypto/Fintech context).
3. FONTS: Add the Google Fonts import to 'index.css' immediately.
4. LAYOUT: Use the 'Bento Grid' strategy for the Dashboard. Do not use simple rows.
5. COMPONENTS: Use Shadcn UI logic but override the styles with the 'E1' design system (rounded-full buttons, glassmorphism cards).
6. NAV: Create a floating glassmorphism navbar.
7. CHARTS: Use Recharts with custom tooltips (dark bg, neon borders).
8. MOCK DATA: Generate realistic financial data for charts (candlesticks, line charts).
9. IMAGES: Use the provided image URLs for backgrounds and placeholders.
10. ACCESSIBILITY: Ensure all text has sufficient contrast against the dark background.
universal_guidelines: Avoid 'AI Slop': No generic centered layouts.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
